Lassi Karjalainen

Technology Management Student @ JYU

lassikarjalainen0@gmail.com • +358 40 356 6526 • Jyväskylä, Finland

Years of IT-hobby Experience

Professional Summary

Software engineer and QA specialist with diverse experience spanning software development, test automation, quality assurance and DevOps. Proficient in end-to-end software development lifecycle, from architecture and implementation to validation and deployment. Demonstrated expertise in building robust automation frameworks using Robot Framework and Python, combined with hands-on development using modern technologies. Served as subject matter expert and patent contributor on medical device software. Master's student in Technology Management with Data Science specialization, bringing strategic thinking to technical implementation. Passionate about delivering high-quality software through comprehensive testing practices and efficient automation.

Core Competencies

Test Automation Python Software Validation Machine Learning Software Testing Linux Environments Git & Version Control Robot Framework Rust CI/CD APIs Database Design Agile/Scrum Code Review

Work Experience

Software Developer

USA Medical Electronix • Remote, Freelance

February 2024 – June 2025
  • Other: Worked as a subject matter expert on the patent for the device and software
  • Development: Designed and developed the software for a medical device (Automated External Defibrillator) from start to finish
  • Collaboration: Worked in an small team with another developer, a supervisor, a software architect and the company leadership, shipping frequently with a lean approach to development resources and project management

Test Automation Trainee

Airbus Defence and Space • Jyväskylä, Finland

May 2024 – September 2024
  • Leadership: Guided and onboarded new trainees and refactored onboarding documentation for new employees and trainees
  • Development: Expanded and improved existing web automation. Explored alternative technologies for a new automation target
  • Collaboration: Worked in an Agile team with developers, a product owner, a software architect and scrum master, shipping 2-week sprints consistently

Software Test Trainee

Airbus Defence and Space • Jyväskylä, Finland

May 2023 – September 2023
  • Testing: Manually tested products both with a robust test set and through exploratory testing. Reported findings to development teams
  • Development: Built a robust integration of concurrent web automation alongside an existing mobile automation framework
  • Collaboration: Worked in an Agile team with developers, a product owner, a software architect and scrum master, shipping 2-week sprints consistently

Featured Projects

Linkkibot TG-bot

View on GitHub

A telegram bot designed to automate event announcing and reminders. Made for Linkki Jyväskylä ry.

Python APIs

TiTOL-peli

Try it out View on GitHub

A Godot based game made for TiTOL ry. The main idea is for teams to race against each other on a map and perform certain tasks as quickly as possible. Heavily inspired by Afrikan Tähti and Gimble.

GDScript GDShader GitHub pipelines

Iltasoitto application

View on GitHub

An application that plays the Jyväskylä Iltasoitto from your phone's speaker at 20:00. Extremely WIP due to Android memory and battery management.

Kotlin Android
